title: bupleurum ranunculoides subsp. telonense
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides subsp. telonense, also known as Chinese hare's ear or Bupleurum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds that can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory infections. The health benefits of Bupleurum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. Bupleurum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and can also be found in traditional Chinese medicine formulas like Xiao Chai Hu Tang and Yin Chiao.
